g.text: Three environment-specific baseline ladders after the current calibration pass. Raw reward units differ by environment.

text.style: fill: #374151; font: 10px 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif; text-anchor: start

g.text: Interpretation: FinRL already validates the baseline-ladder concept. CityLearn shows a strong passive baseline but a stronger current FutureAware proxy. Grid2Op remains scenario-limited and needs harder chronics for meaningful separation.
